tier_1.title: Missing assertion in test_foo
tier_1.summary: test_foo calls the function but never asserts the return value
tier_1.rationale: Targeted, localized user-impact issue — audit follow-up scope
tier_1.severity_reason: Silent test passes even when function returns wrong value
tier_1.suggested_fix: Add assert result.exit_code == 0 and assert payload['success'] is True
